extra.reason: VarName type defined with tests, __post_init__ guard, domain methods
All ~430 frontend/COBOL construction sites wrapped with VarName
Field types changed, VM cascaded, bridge removed, ~600 test assertions updated, production code fixed (dataflow, summaries, field_fallback, MCP). 13,017 tests passing.
All str(name) calls replaced with native VarName keys in type_inference.py, TypeEnvironment, TypeEnvironmentBuilder, and vm.py. 13017 tests pass.
FieldName domain type complete: tagged FieldKind (PROPERTY/INDEX/SPECIAL), kind as identity, no str bridge, all instruction/heap/handler/test sites migrated. 13,034 tests passing.
bindings keys migrated to VarName, bridge wrapping removed. 13,039 tests passing.

YAGNI — VarScopeInfo already provides structured decomposition of mangled names. declare_block_var() produces 'x$1' mangled strings and stores VarScopeInfo(original_name='x', scope_depth=1) as separate metadata. Adding base/scope_id to VarName would duplicate this. No consumer needs to parse mangled names from VarName.value — they use var_scope_metadata to recover the original name. Reopen if a concrete use case emerges where VarName-level decomposition is needed and VarScopeInfo doesn't suffice.

Already complete — FuncRef.label is already typed as CodeLabel (not str). All 48 construction sites pass CodeLabel, registry uses CodeLabel keys, emit_func_ref and linker already accept CodeLabel. Likely completed during 7eq9 (CodeLabel propagation). No work needed.

FuncName domain type complete: accessor pattern with FuncName-keyed dicts on FunctionRegistry (func_refs, class_methods), Builtins (TABLE, METHOD_TABLE), _InferenceContext (func_return_types, class_method_types), COBOL IO dispatch. No str bridge. All callers use accessors. 13,080 tests passing.
Dead split hack removed. Frontend already emits clean FuncName. Filed 0tsw for CallCtorFunction follow-up.

Address domain type complete: VMState accessors (heap_get/set/contains/ensure/items/keys, region_get/set) as permanent API. vm._heap: dict[Address, HeapObject], vm._regions: dict[Address, bytearray] — both private. Pointer.base, HeapWrite.obj_addr, NewObject.addr, RegionWrite.region_addr all Address. NullHeapObject for miss returns. No str bridge. 13,106 tests passing.

All sub-issues closed: VarName type defined (b9cd), frontend sites wrapped (jdx0), field types + VM cascade (90z9), type_inference push (d3gp), structured decomposition (kozu), ClosureEnvironment bindings (ss6g). 13,106 tests passing.
False positive — UNOP 'not' IS correct. The repeat-until frontend emits BINOP == then UNOP not to negate the until-condition for the loop-back branch. Verified by inspecting actual IR output.
Strengthened: added accumulator s > 0 assertion alongside index counter check.
Removed vacuous disjunction. Now asserts not hasattr(inst, 'type_hint') directly.
Added assertion that __future__ is absent from all extracted refs.
Added pytest.raises(AttributeError) mutation test to verify frozen dataclass.
Added assertion that RETURN operand references BINOP result register.
Downgraded to P2. Strengthened with isinstance(val.value, SymbolicValue) assertion documenting known limitation.
Downgraded to P2. Strengthened with isinstance(val.value, SymbolicValue) assertion documenting known limitation.
Extended PHP source to mutate original after clone; now asserts copy_name==Rex AND original_name==Buddy, proving independence.
Replaced 'is not None' with isinstance(inner, Pointer) — verifies concrete type returned by as_ref().unwrap() chain.
Fixed: renamed to test_resolves_relative_double_dot (was testing level=2 not level=1), added concrete path assertion == pkg/models.py. A correct single-dot test already existed at line 108.
Strengthened: added assertions on summary.function.label and summary.function.params after fixpoint convergence.
Added transitive_graph assertion: len(transitive_graph) >= len(raw_graph).
Removed vacuous 'or True'. Now asserts len(ctx.instructions) >= 1 and instructions[-1].label == label.

Split into two tests: test_initial_value_100_in_region (data division only, asserts 100) and test_arithmetic_produces_correct_result (full execution, asserts 125). Added stop_before_procedure parameter to _execute_straight_line.

By design — func_symbol_table is populated exclusively by emit_func_ref(), not by emit_inst(Label_). Label_ is a control-flow marker; emit_func_ref registers the name→label mapping and emits a CONST for callable resolution. The original test was always wrong; the or True hid it. Current test correctly asserts instruction recording.

FuncRef.name changed from str to FuncName. 6 production construction sites wrapped, 2 registry double-wraps removed, 3 str() boundary conversions added (StackFramePush, ExportTable, func_param_types). 33 test sites + 8 test assertions updated across 12 test files. 13,108 tests passing.

StackFrame.function_name and StackFramePush.function_name changed from str to FuncName. 5 production sites wrapped, 1 str() boundary removed (calls.py gfow leftover), 3 serialization boundaries added (to_dict, MCP formatting). ~82 test sites across 28 files updated. 13,108 tests passing.

Created ClassName domain type (interpreter/class_name.py). ClassRef.name changed from str to ClassName. 4 production construction sites wrapped via emit_class_ref/_emit_class_ref + llm_frontend + linker. ~6 production read sites use str() at boundary (registry dicts, scalar(), lookup_methods). NO_CLASS_REF uses NO_CLASS_NAME sentinel with falsy __bool__. 7 test files updated. 13,108 tests passing.

ClassRef.parents changed from tuple[str, ...] to tuple[ClassName, ...]. Wrapping added at emit_class_ref (context.py, _base.py) and llm_frontend.py. Registry boundary uses str() conversion for class_parents dict. run.py serialization updated. 3 test files updated. 13,108 tests passing. Unblocks y7zx (registry ClassName push).

Pushed ClassName into FunctionRegistry: classes, class_methods, class_parents dict keys all changed from str to ClassName. class_parents values also ClassName. lookup_methods and register_method signatures updated. All callers in calls.py, memory.py, call_graph.py wrap runtime type_hint strings with ClassName(). _expand_parent_chains fully typed. TypeNode boundary uses str(). 6 test files updated. Filed w04c for TypeNode.name → ClassName. 13,108 tests passing.

Pushed FuncName into class_method_signatures inner key and method_signatures. Changed dict[TypeExpr, dict[str, ...]] to dict[TypeExpr, dict[FuncName, ...]]. Updated _build_func_signatures in both type_inference.py and type_environment_builder.py. TypeEnvironment.get_func_signature now takes FuncName. All handler-layer .get() calls use FuncName keys. ~100 test assertion sites updated across 5 test files. 13,108 tests passing.

ExportTable.functions keyed by FuncName, ExportTable.classes keyed by ClassName. lookup() converts str→FuncName/ClassName internally. all_names() returns set[str] via str() conversion. Compiler drops str() wrappers. Linker drops FuncName()/ClassName() re-wrapping. Fixed deduplication bug in build_export_table (str vs FuncName membership check). 4 test files updated. 13,108 tests passing.

Not applicable — TypeNode.name represents nodes in the type hierarchy graph, including built-in types (Int, Float, Any, Number) that are not class names. Using ClassName would be semantically wrong for DEFAULT_TYPE_NODES. The str() boundary in run.py:601 is the correct conversion point from ClassName (registry) → str (type graph).

ExportTable.variables changed from dict[str, str] to dict[VarName, Register]. Keys use typed.name (VarName) directly, values use typed.value_reg (Register). lookup() converts str→VarName internally. all_names() returns str via str() conversion. 3 test files updated. 13,108 tests passing.
Added type annotations: dict[CodeLabel, FuncRef] and dict[CodeLabel, ClassRef]. Annotation-only change, zero runtime impact.

FieldEndpoint.field changed from str to FieldName. Removed str() in _find_store_fields/_find_load_fields (summaries.py). MCP serialization boundary uses str(). 8 test files updated. 13,108 tests passing.

Definition.block_label, Use.block_label changed from str to CodeLabel. DataflowResult.block_facts and solve_reaching_definitions/extract_def_use_chains return types changed from dict[str, ...] to dict[CodeLabel, ...]. NO_DEFINITION sentinel uses NO_LABEL. Zero test changes — all callers already passed CodeLabel. 13,108 tests passing.

Migrated 669 test construction sites from result_reg=str to result_reg=Register(). Fixed LLM frontend JSON deserialization to wrap with Register(). Fixed chunked_llm_frontend._renumber_reg to return Register. Bridge in _Flat.__init__ retained as canonical conversion layer for _to_typed pipeline. 8 JSON fixture strings intentionally kept as strings. 42 test files modified. 13,108 tests passing.

Pushed domain types into all 8 SymbolTable fields: FieldInfo.name→FieldName, FunctionInfo.name→FuncName, ClassInfo.name→ClassName, ClassInfo.parents→tuple[ClassName,...], ClassInfo.fields key→FieldName, ClassInfo.methods key→FuncName, SymbolTable.classes key→ClassName, SymbolTable.functions key→FuncName. NULL_FIELD uses NO_FIELD_NAME sentinel with is_present() check. resolve_field() signature typed. 60 construction sites across 14 frontends, ~15 read sites, ~160 test lines updated. Filed ldjl for constants/match_args deferral. 13,108 tests passing.

Superseded by cv82 (StorageIdentifier protocol + used_storage/defined_storage) and lybv (migrate Definition.variable/Use.variable). The original scope expanded during brainstorming to include instruction-level typed field access instead of just a type annotation change.

Created StorageIdentifier protocol (interpreter/storage_identifier.py). Added reads() and writes() methods to all 30 instruction classes in instructions.py. Fixed 33 bare-string value_reg sites across 18 frontend files. Reverted _defs_of/_uses_of rewrite — blocked by v11s (remaining bare-string Register fields on obj_reg, left, right, etc.). 13,108 tests passing.

Removed 88 str() wrappings from Register-typed fields across 9 frontend files. All direct typed-instruction construction sites now pass Register objects directly. Fixed StorageIdentifier protocol to not require .value property (Register has .name, VarName has .value — they share is_present/str/hash). Verified reads()/writes() work correctly across 6 languages. 1 false positive fixed (FuncName(str(dec_reg)) in Python decorator lowering). 13,108 tests passing.

Definition.variable and Use.variable changed from str to StorageIdentifier. _defs_of and _uses_of now delegate to instruction.writes()/reads(). Removed _VALUE_PRODUCERS, _VAR_DEFINERS constants (dead code). Removed _is_temporary_register string heuristic — isinstance(id, VarName) for leaves, isinstance(id, Register) for intermediates. All internal dicts (produced_from, defs_by_var, gen_map, local_defs) use StorageIdentifier keys. Added LoadVar.reads() override. 2 test files updated. 13,108 tests passing.
ContinuationName domain type implemented — 5 type annotations, 3+5 emit/test sites, 2 factory converters, ~20 test references migrated. 13,126 tests passing.
Duplicate of ti2e — closed as part of ContinuationName migration
ClosureId domain type migration complete — frozen dataclass with NO_CLOSURE_ID sentinel, all 25 change sites migrated, 13141 tests passing
Duplicate of red-dragon-ynpw, closed together

Interprocedural pointer flow analysis fixed — DereferenceEndpoint type, STORE_INDIRECT/LOAD_INDIRECT summary extraction, ADDRESS_OF argument tracing. C pointer-passing programs now produce correct flows. 13,162 tests passing.
Two-phase execution implemented: module preamble runs before entry_point dispatch. All 4 constructor tests pass. 13,168 total tests pass.

Multi-module Java linking implemented: MavenSourceRootDiscovery, multi-root JavaImportResolver with wildcard support, list[ResolvedImport] return type, NO_PATH null object. Integration test verifies val==43 and label=='result' across 4 modules.
topological_sort now tolerates cycles by forcing remaining nodes into arbitrary order with a warning log
Added UNSIGNED_RSHIFT (>>>) to BinopKind enum

Implemented: EntryPoint type with function(predicate) and top_level() modes, run_linked() execution function, run() refactored to build LinkedProgram and delegate, compile_project() removed, compile_directory() simplified, 145 call sites migrated, ADR-130 written. 16 follow-up issues filed for per-frontend multi-module integration tests.
Fixed in 23b81750: _lower_vec_macro special-cases vec! in lower_macro_invocation, emitting NewArray + StoreIndex per element. xfail test un-xfailed and strengthened with element value assertions.
Fixed: LOAD_INDIRECT on obj_*/arr_* with no field 0 now returns the Pointer itself (identity) instead of SymbolicValue. C# ref Box b as method receiver now works. Commit c33902d6.
GlobalLeakFunctionScopingStrategy implemented and wired. DECL_VAR and STORE_VAR new-variable path now route FuncRef writes through the strategy. All three leaky scoping tests (ruby, php, lua) pass.

result_reg, label, branch_targets promoted to InstructionBase as concrete fields. opcode and operands declared as @property stubs. inst: Any cast removed from __str__. cfg.py attr errors resolved automatically.
handle_list_opcodes implemented in mcp_server/tools.py with _OPCODE_CATEGORIES and _OPCODE_NOTES dicts. Registered as list_opcodes in mcp_server/server.py. 19 unit tests pass.
Fixed test to properly verify call chain structure: quadruple -> double -> add. Added assertions to check chain root contains 'quadruple', and that children nodes contain 'double' and 'add' labels.
Fixed test to verify LOAD_INDEX opcodes are emitted for array destructuring. Added assertion to check >= 3 LOAD_INDEX instructions for destructuring three elements [a, b, c].
Fixed test to verify whole_program_graph contains actual flow endpoints, not just non-empty.
Fixed test to verify summaries contain expected functions f and g by checking labels.
Fixed test to verify call graph contains specific functions f and g using label.extract_name().
